PLAINTIFF STIPULATES TO THE PRO TEM JUDGE. THERE BEING NO OTHER APPEARANCE, THE MOTION AND SANCTIONS ARE GRANTED. MR. Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Deposition Attendance Of A Person Most Qualified And Custodian Of Records Of Defendant General Motors Llc And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Dec-01-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance via Zoom:
Devin Bissman, Esq. of the Knight Law Group LLP, Tel. 310.552.2250, for plaintiff;
No appearance by any other party or counsel.

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF MARCO LOPEZ' Motion To Compel Deposition Attendance Of A Person Most Qualified And Custodian Of Records Of Defendant General Motors Llc And Request For Sanctions.

Plaintiff stipulates to the matter being decided by the pro tem judge. The pro tem judge and counsel for plaintiff (both appearing remotely) authorize the clerk to sign the formal stipulation form on their behalf.

There being no other appearance, PLAINTIFF MARCO LOPEZ' Motion To Compel Deposition Attendance Of A Person Most Qualified And Custodian Of Records Of Defendant General Motors Llc And Request For Sanctions is granted. A compliance date for identification of person(s) most qualified and deposition dates is set for 12/15/22. Sanctions are imposed and due on 12/15/22. The deadline for the depostions of person(s) most qualified is 1/16/23. Documents are due at the time of the deposition(s).

Mr. Bissman is to prepare and submit the proposed order to the following email: williamclynn@gmail.com.

Judge Pro Tem: William Lynn. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Matter not reported. (302/JPT)
